mentions.note: CEO Len Schleifer on show April 2005; early-stage biotech; $1,000 investment became $1,501,000+ by 2024; blockbuster macular degeneration drug; prime example of scalability.
Dupixent, Eylea HD, and Libtayo franchises keep the growth story intact after a 60% rally off the lows.
Pharmaceutical diversification option; benefits from healthcare demographic tailwinds; defensive vs speculation volatility.
Cramer regrets not owning; much better drug bet than peers with exception of Eli Lilly; should have pulled trigger at JP Morgan conference.
Breaking out; CEO Len Schleifer executing well; forward PE 18-19, PEG ~1.6, strong pipeline; Cramer bought for charitable trust alongside Amgen.
